name: Location transaction report
description: Reports detailing transactions made to residential and non-residential locations

dataset.name: Location transactions
dataset.query:
WITH affected_stats AS (
    SELECT 
        linked_transaction_id,
        COUNT(DISTINCT location_id) AS number_locations_affected
    FROM prisons.locationsinsideprison_location_history
    GROUP BY 1
),

distinct_paths AS (
    -- Get unique paths per transaction
    SELECT DISTINCT 
        lh.linked_transaction_id,
        l.path_hierarchy
    FROM prisons.locationsinsideprison_location_history lh
    JOIN prisons.locationsinsideprison_location l ON l.id = lh.location_id
),

ranked_paths AS (
    -- Assign a row number to each path within a transaction
    -- This allows us to cap the input to LISTAGG
    SELECT 
        linked_transaction_id,
        path_hierarchy,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY linked_transaction_id ORDER BY path_hierarchy) as row_num
    FROM distinct_paths
),

aggregated_paths AS (
    -- Only concatenate the first 100 paths to stay well under the 64KB limit
    SELECT 
        linked_transaction_id,
        CAST(LISTAGG(CASE WHEN row_num <= 100 THEN path_hierarchy END, ', ') 
             WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY path_hierarchy) AS VARCHAR(4000)) || 
             CASE WHEN MAX(row_num) > 100 THEN '... (and more)' ELSE '' END AS locations_affected
    FROM ranked_paths
    GROUP BY 1
)

SELECT 
    tx.prison_id,
    al.description as prison_name,
    (CASE p.resi_location_service_active WHEN true THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END) AS service_active,
    tx.tx_start_time,
    tx.transaction_type,
    (CASE tx.transaction_type
        WHEN 'LOCATION_CREATE' THEN 'Created residential location'
        WHEN 'LOCATION_UPDATE' THEN 'Updated residential location'
        WHEN 'LOCATION_CREATE_NON_RESI' THEN 'Created non-residential location'
        WHEN 'LOCATION_UPDATE_NON_RESI' THEN 'Updated non-residential location'
        WHEN 'CAPACITY_CHANGE' THEN 'Capacity change'
        WHEN 'CELL_TYPE_CHANGES' THEN 'Cell type change'
        WHEN 'DEACTIVATION' THEN 'Deactivation'
        WHEN 'PERMANENT_DEACTIVATION' THEN 'Permanent deactivation'
        WHEN 'REACTIVATION' THEN 'Reactivation'
        WHEN 'CELL_CONVERTION_TO_ROOM' THEN 'Cell conversion to room'
        WHEN 'ROOM_CONVERTION_TO_CELL' THEN 'Room conversion to cell'
        WHEN 'SIGNED_OP_CAP' THEN 'Signed operational capacity'
        WHEN 'RESI_SERVICE_ACTIVATION' THEN 'Residential service activation'
        WHEN 'SYNC' THEN 'NOMIS sync (Residential)'
        WHEN 'SYNC_NON_RESIDENTIAL' THEN 'NOMIS sync (Non-Residential)'
        WHEN 'DELETE' THEN 'Locations deleted'
        WHEN 'APPROVAL_PROCESS_ACTIVATION' THEN 'Certification approval activated'
        WHEN 'PENDING_CELL_CHANGE' THEN 'Pending cell change'
        WHEN 'REQUEST_CERTIFICATION_APPROVAL' THEN 'Request certification approval'
        WHEN 'APPROVE_CERTIFICATION_REQUEST' THEN 'Approve request'
        WHEN 'REJECT_CERTIFICATION_REQUEST' THEN 'Reject request'
        WHEN 'WITHDRAW_CERTIFICATION_REQUEST' THEN 'Withdraw request'
        ELSE 'Unknown transaction type' 
    END) AS transaction_description,
    tx.transaction_detail,
    tx.transaction_invoked_by,
    initcap(sm.first_name) AS invoked_by_first_name,
    initcap(sm.last_name) AS invoked_by_last_name,
    COALESCE(stats.number_locations_affected, 0) AS number_locations_affected,
    agg.locations_affected
FROM 
    prisons.locationsinsideprison_linked_transaction tx
JOIN prisons.nomis_agency_locations al on al.agy_loc_id = tx.prison_id
LEFT JOIN prisons.nomis_staff_user_accounts sua on sua.username = tx.transaction_invoked_by 
LEFT JOIN prisons.nomis_staff_members sm on sm.staff_id = sua.staff_id
LEFT JOIN 
    prisons.locationsinsideprison_prison_configuration p ON p.prison_id = tx.prison_id
LEFT JOIN 
    affected_stats stats ON stats.linked_transaction_id = tx.id
LEFT JOIN 
    aggregated_paths agg ON agg.linked_transaction_id = tx.id

dataset.name: Prisons
dataset.query:
select agy_loc_id prison_id, description prison_name FROM prisons.nomis_agency_locations al 
where al.agency_location_type = 'INST'
and al.active_flag = 'Y' AND al.agy_loc_id NOT IN ('TRN', 'OUT')
order by description

report.name: Location transactions
report.description: Details each transaction that has occurred in a location
